title: Guiyang, Guizhou — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Guiyang is a city in Guizhou with a population of 5,987,000. A mountain city in southwest China, known for its cool summers, Miao and Dong minority cultures, and emerging big data industry.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
